# גמישות — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A 30-day splits challenge website that counts down each day and sends daily reminders to practice the splits. The site features a warm-up and flexibility guide to help users progress safely, and culminates in a celebratory 'SPAGAAAAT' moment on day 30. The concept is fun, motivating, and gamified — combining fitness education with daily accountability and a rewarding finish line.

---

### בית
https://gmishut.zappy5.app
A 30-day splits challenge website that counts down each day and sends daily reminders to practice the splits. The site features a warm-up and flexibility guide

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About גמישות
A 30-day splits challenge website that counts down each day and sends daily reminders to practice the splits. The site features a warm-up and flexibility guide to help users progress safely, and culminates in a celebratory 'SPAGAAAAT' moment on day 30. The concept is fun, motivating, and gamified — combining fitness education with daily accountability and a rewarding finish line.

## Target Audience
- אנשים שרוצים ללמוד שפגאט תוך 30 יום
- מחפשי גמישות
- מתרגלי יוגה
- רקדנים

## Industry
כושר וגמישות

---
